# CWE-323 vulnerable — Reusing a Nonce, Key Pair in Encryption
lang: go
file: CWE-323-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var sharedNonce = []byte("fixednonce12")

func SealUserBlob(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, plaintext []byte) error {
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	aead, _ := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	ciphertext := aead.Seal(nil, sharedNonce, plaintext, nil)
	return db.Exec("UPDATE users SET blob = ? WHERE id = ?", ciphertext, c.Query("id")).Error
}
